ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the API parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., query, path, header) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is required */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "enum_values" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of possible values for enum parameters */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example value for the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the request */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the API request */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the request (for POST requests) */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP response status code */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the request in milliseconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message for failed requests */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the response (for successful requests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_request_parameters" (
  "request_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request parameter */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API request */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter used in the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_request_parameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES api_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_request_parameters_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES api_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_parameter_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., min, max, enum) */,
  "validation_value" TEXT /* Value for the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)
